DARV.title: Donut's Patron
DARV.description: A mysterious feline spirit that watches over Princess Donut. Offers blessings in exchange for entertainment. Highly opinionated about cat class choices.
NEOW.title: The Dungeon Tutorial AI
NEOW.description: The dungeon's onboarding system. Offers starting blessings to new crawlers. Surprisingly helpful for a system designed to kill you.
PAEL.title: The Ratings Executive
PAEL.description: A Primus representative who monitors audience engagement. Offers power boosts when your ratings are flagging. Everything comes at a cost.
TEZCATARA.title: The Floor Architect
TEZCATARA.description: The ancient intelligence that designed this floor. Offers knowledge of secret passages and hidden rooms in exchange for 'design feedback.'
OROBAS.title: The Bookworm
OROBAS.description: A scholarly entity trapped in the dungeon's library system. Trades knowledge for card modifications. Knows things the dungeon AI doesn't want you to know.
TANX.title: The Tank Commander
TANX.description: A military spirit from a previous dungeon season. Offers combat training and defensive blessings. Respects crawlers who take hits without flinching.
NONUPEIPE.title: The Ninefold Serpent
NONUPEIPE.description: An ancient multi-headed entity that exists across nine dungeon floors simultaneously. Each head offers a different deal. Trust none of them.
VAKUU.title: The Void Between Floors
VAKUU.description: An entity that exists in the empty space between dungeon floors. Offers passage and power, but everything it gives was taken from another crawler.
